---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the Stellar Bounty Board
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're facing. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any design ideas or API changes.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why they weren't suitable.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
